# Results

<!-- Draft from 07_manuscript/result_claims.csv and result_paragraphs.md -->

## Study Selection

## Study Characteristics

<!-- STUDY_CHARACTERISTICS_START -->
<!-- STUDY_CHARACTERISTICS_END -->

## Quantitative Synthesis

<!-- RESULT_SUMMARY_TABLE_START -->
<!-- RESULT_SUMMARY_TABLE_END -->

<!-- RESULT_PARAGRAPHS_START -->
<!-- RESULT_PARAGRAPHS_END -->

## Sensitivity and Subgroup Analyses

## Publication Bias
